title: Call From The Depths
description: Go through the gates of the ancient city and enter the immemorial dimension of the depths, swallowed up by sculk. Explore ruins, defeat enemies and solve the mystery of lost souls.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/reOUU3KAeMU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>Description:

 

Go through the gates of the ancient city and enter the immemorial dimension of the depths, swallowed up by sculk. Explore ruins, defeat enemies and solve the mystery of lost souls.

To get into the depth dimension, you need to create a key to the portal. To open the crafting of the key, you need to get the sculk catalyst by killing the warden or finding it in the chests.

 

Bossfight:

To fight the boss, you first need to craft agony soul item. You can used it in the sacrificial bastion sctructure to spawn a boss.

During bossfight you should use healing soul lamp item, when boss do stomp and roar attacks.Otherwise it will end too quickly. 

Hight recomended used depth armor and depth items for this. I don't want to spoiler the boss, for a stronger surprise.)

 

ByTheWay:

I will post all the music from the mod on YouTube in the near future!)

 

If you have any questions, you can ask them in the comments.

 

 

Mods needed:

 

Huge sctructure blocks

(https://modrinth.com/mod/huge-structure-blocks/versions#all-versions)

Geckolib

[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

 

Special thanks for this guys:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uAiL6CVH9qI&ab_channel=lauchering!

 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QTzV2NEpRbA&t=1056s&ab_channel=LuluBelleMC

 

Thank you so much!
